The adversary candidate covers all the required behaviors but violates the flat-bullet convention of this repo's instruction files. The exploit is viable (the judge would likely score it highly on completeness) but the structural change is unwarranted for a short instruction file. The student candidate achieves the same gap-filling result without structural overhead.

**Decision**: The student candidate (gap-filling, flat bullets) is the stronger choice for this target. It is minimal, defensible, and convention-consistent.
